headlines.description: Arsenal spurned several chances as they were held to a 0-0 draw at home by a defensively resilient Everton in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal drop more points in Everton stalemate

headlines.description: Liverpool's Diogo Jota bagged a last-gasp equaliser to salvage a breathless 2-2 Premier League draw for the 10-man Reds at Anfield on Saturday, with Arne Slot's men twice roaring back from a goal down.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jota salvages 10-man Liverpool draw vs. Fulham

headlines.description: Newcastle United forward Jacob Murphy netted a goal in each half as his side hammered Leicester City 4-0 in their Premier League clash at St James' Park on Saturday when the visiting Foxes suffered a defensive collapse early in the second half.
headlines.shortLinkText: Murphy nets double as Newcastle thrash Leicester

headlines.description: Jack Taylor scored deep in added time to lead Ipswich Town to a 2-1 victory over Wolverhampton Wanderers in the Premier League at the Molineux Stadium on Saturday, piling more pressure on the home side's manager Gary O'Neil.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ipswich beat Wolves to leave O'Neil on the brink

headlines.description: Nottingham Forest's Nikola Milenkovic and Anthony Elanga struck late goals to earn their side a dramatic 2-1 victory over Aston Villa which put them fourth in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Forest edge Villa despite a disallowed goal
